verses.text: Kitawng kawmkawmin pawipi sungah an nekna sangin lungnuam takin mohkeu themkhat nekna hoihzaw hi
A pil silapa in a topa' ta hai tungah aana nei-in a topa' gamh pawlkhat a luah hi
Kham leh ngunte mei sungah kize-et a, mihingte' lungsim Topa in ze-et hi
Migilote in gitlohna thu bek mah ngaihin nei uh a, zuautheite in zuauthu mah ngaihin nei hi
A zawngte a simmawhpa in amah a Piangsakpa a simmawh hi a, midangte' tuahsiatna-ah a lungdam mipa in gim thuak hamtang ding hi
Tute pen puteekte-a' dingin minthan'na lukhu hi a, tate pen pate' minthan'na ahi hi
Miliante in zuauthu gen ngeilo a, mihaite in na-a kimang kam pau ngeilo hi
Sumgolh a zangte in ai bangin ngaihsun uh a, a deih khempeuh uh a ngahsak dingin ngaihsun uh hi
Mi' khialhna a maisakte midangte in itin lawm hau uh a, mi' khialhna ciamtehna pen lawm taanna ahi hi
Mihai khat zavei a kisatna sangin mipil khat khatvei tai-na in bunzaw hi
Thusia bekbek a deih tawntung migilote kiangah, a gilo kamtaipa bangin sihna tung ding hi
Mihaite a hai gamtatna uh i tuahkhak sangin a no a kilaksak vompi hang khat tuak lehang hoihzaw lai hi
Thuhoih kimlai thusia tawh a thukte' innsungah cikmahin thusia veng cih om ngeilo hi
Kitot i kipat ciangin tui lipi cin'na phung kehsakkhak tawh kibang hi. Tua ahih manin a nasiat ma-in kitot khawlpak in
Migilote khahkhongna, thuman mite mawhsakna, a nih tuakin Topa in deihlo hi
Mihaipa in thu ngaihsun theilo ahih manin pilna zon'na ding sum tampi a zat hangin a phattuamna omlo hi
Lawm citak in a tawntungin hong it a, i sanggamte pen i lungkhamna a hong thuakpih dingin a piang ahi hi
Thu a ngaihsun theilo mihaite bek midang' leiba lohsak dingin kipia ngam hi
Khialh ding a utte lungkham ding a ut hi a, kihisak-a kam paupaute buaina ding a zongzong ahi hi
Lungsim hoihlote in lungdam mulo uh a, mi a khem theite in lungkhamna tuak uh hi
Tapa hai pen a pa' lungkhamna hi a, ta hai a neipa a lung damlo hi
Maitaina in ci damsak a, maigum tawntungna in guhtui teepkang hi
A ginalo thukhente in sumgolh sangsim uh a, a thukhenna uhah thuman om nawnlo hi
Mipilte in a hoihpenin gamtatna ding thei uh a, mihaite in a cihna ding theilo uh hi
Ta hai in a pa dahsak a, a nu lungkhamsak hi
A thuman mi gimpiak ding hoihlo a, mihoihte satna pen thukhialhna ahi hi
Thu a thei taktakte in gengen khollo a, a paupau khollote thumu taktak hizaw hi
Mihaite pauloin om leh a pil mahin kingaihsun hi. Thungaihsun thei na hihna a kilatna dingin pauloin om khinkhian in.
